overall_justification: The newspaper edition includes a brief, factual report on the upcoming discussion in the Chamber of Deputies regarding the Caixa de Conversão project based on a 15d exchange rate. It also mentions the anticipated participation of Deputy Altino Arantes in favor of the project.  However, these mentions are primarily informative, lacking any explicit endorsement or criticism of the proposal from the newspaper itself. The dominant theme of the edition revolves around other political matters, particularly criticisms of President Rodrigues Alves' handling of the Jacuacanga arsenal issue, which overshadows the Caixa de Conversão mentions. Therefore, the overall stance is classified as neutral due to the lack of clear editorializing on the Caixa de Conversão itself.

supporting_evidence.quote: A discussão na Camara dos Deputados do projecto que crea a Caixa de Conversão sobre a base do cambio a 15 d. deve começar amanhã, constando que abrirá o debate um dos signatários dos votos em separado, divergentes do parecer do sr. David Campista.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This quote provides factual information about the upcoming debate on the Caixa de Conversão, indicating the proposed exchange rate and the dissenting opinions. It sets the context for the discussion but doesn't reveal the newspaper's stance.

supporting_evidence.quote: E' esperado com interesse, nessa discussão, o discurso do joven deputado paulista, sr. Altino Arantes, que falará em favor do projecto.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This quote highlights the anticipated participation of a deputy who supports the project, but it's presented as neutral reporting rather than an endorsement by the newspaper.
